source_pr.title: *: move the `Handle` of stats to single package.
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Solve the cycle import problem in #10106 

### What is changed and how it works?

Split the `statistics` package to two parts
```
statistics
|
└-handler
```

Then `statistics` won't import `infoschema` package. So the cycle import is resolved.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change
 - Has exported variable/fields change

symptoms: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
failure_signature: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: move the `Handle` of stats to single package.
fix_pattern: *: move the `Handle` of stats to single package.

evidence: evidence: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
